# ToolCapsule

ToolCapsule converts heavy MCP servers into lazy Agent Skills. MCP stays the capability layer; Skills become the agent-facing workflow layer.

## Install

```bash
npm install -g toolcapsule
tcap --help
```

## Register an MCP server

Remote MCP:

```bash
tcap init <name> --url <remote-mcp-url> --target claude
```

stdio MCP:

```bash
tcap init <name> --command <command> --arg <arg> --target claude
```

Creates `~/.toolcapsule/profiles/<name>.json` + `SKILL.md`.

## List tools

```bash
tcap tools <name>               # compact one-line
tcap tools <name> --names       # names only
tcap tools <name> --json        # raw JSON
```

## Inspect one tool

```bash
tcap schema <name> <tool>
```

## Call a tool

```bash
tcap call <name> <tool> @/tmp/tcap-<name>-<tool>.json
```

If it fails, edit the args file and re-run.

## Safety

Do not print or commit MCP URLs, tokens, API keys, credentials, or profile JSON files. Profile files in `~/.toolcapsule/profiles/` are private.
